title: Fix About page bio, remove Numerology, add New Kundali service, add photo/video gallery area

requirements.text: Add a dedicated 'About Vijay Sawkar' bio section on the About page that includes his personal background, years of experience, notable achievements, and certifications/qualifications in Vedic Astrology, Vastu, and Gemstone Therapy. This section must be visible and prominent when users visit the About page.

quotes: U didn't add the about vijay sawkar thing

acceptanceCriteria: About page displays a clearly labeled section with Vijay Sawkar's biography
Section includes experience details, certifications, and qualifications
Section is visually distinct and styled consistently with the cosmic dark theme

requirements.text: Remove 'Numerology' from the Available Services section on the Services page. Ensure no Numerology entry appears in the services list or any related UI components (e.g., Footer services list, Home page service highlights).

quotes: if u go in available services , there's still numerology present there

acceptanceCriteria: Numerology does not appear in the Services page service list
Numerology does not appear in the Footer services list
Numerology does not appear in the Home page service highlights
No other references to Numerology remain in user-facing UI

requirements.text: Add 'New Kundali' (Kundali preparation/creation) as a distinct service entry in the Services page. Include a description explaining what the service covers and list available consultation modes (online/offline). Also add it to the booking consultation type options if applicable.

quotes: in service also add issue of new kundali

acceptanceCriteria: Services page includes a 'New Kundali' service card with title and description
Service card lists available consultation modes
BookConsultation page consultation type dropdown/select includes 'New Kundali' as an option

requirements.text: Add a dedicated photo and video gallery section to the website. Admin users (authenticated via Internet Identity) should be able to upload photos and videos; all visitors should be able to view them. This gallery area should be accessible from the main navigation or a dedicated page, and support displaying both images and video media. Reuse the existing backend blob storage and the media gallery pattern already present in Contact.tsx if applicable.

quotes: u didn't even keep area for photo and video

acceptanceCriteria: A photo and video gallery section/page is accessible from the site
All visitors can view uploaded photos and videos
Authenticated admin users can upload new photos and videos
Authenticated admin users can delete existing photos and videos
Gallery is styled consistently with the cosmic dark theme

constraints: Do not modify files listed in frontend.immutablePaths
Maintain the existing cosmic dark theme across all changes
Do not introduce new backend canisters or external services
nonGoals: Redesigning the overall site layout or navigation structure
